phrases.text_local: Quais restaurantes locais você recomenda nesta área?
phrases.pronunciation: KWEYESH rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tihsh loo-KEYESH voh-SEH reh-koo-MAYNG-duh NEHSH-tuh AH-reeuh?

likely_response.local: Experimente o Mercado Municipal para petiscos e o Café Central para pratos típicos.
likely_response.pronunciation: ehsh-pih-ree-MAYNG-tih AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL PUH-ruh peh-TEESH-koosh EH AW kuh-FEH sayngt-RAHL PUH-ruh PRAH-toosh TEE-pee-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Try Municipal Market for snacks and Café Central for traditional dishes.

responses.english: Try Municipal Market for snacks and Café Central for traditional dishes.
responses.phonetic: ehsh-pih-ree-MAYNG-tih AW meh-ruh-KAH-doo moo-nee-see-PAHL PUH-ruh peh-TEESH-koosh EH AW kuh-FEH sayngt-RAHL PUH-ruh PRAH-toosh TEE-pee-koosh.
responses.local: Experimente o Mercado Municipal para petiscos e o Café Central para pratos típicos.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso fazer um pedido num terraço por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo fuh-ZEHR OONNG peh-DEE-doo NOONNG teh-RAH-soo POOR uh-KEE?

phrases.text_local: Bom dia, onde é o posto de turismo perto do portão da cidade velha?
phrases.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OHNG-dih EH AW POHSH-too DIH too-REEZH-moo PEHR-too DOO poo-ruh-TOWN DUH see-DAH-dih VEH-lyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Tour desks in Albufeira are often located near major landmarks like the old town gate for easy access by tourists.

likely_response.local: Ao lado do portão da cidade velha.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW LAH-doo DOO poo-ruh-TOWN DUH see-DAH-dih VEH-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Next to the old town gate.

responses.english: Next to the old town gate.
responses.phonetic: OW LAH-doo DOO poo-ruh-TOWN DUH see-DAH-dih VEH-lyuh.
responses.local: Ao lado do portão da cidade velha.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar pelos souvenirs que comprei na Rua 5 de Outubro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR PEH-loosh soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh KIH koomp-RAY NUH ROOUH SEEN-koo DIH oow-TOOB-roo?

likely_response.local: Pague no caixa da loja onde comprou o souvenir. Alguns quiosques só aceitam dinheiro, por isso é bom ter trocado.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAH-gih NOO KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh OHNG-dih koomp-ROHW AW soow-vih-NEER. ahl-GOONNGSH KEEOHSH-kihsh SAW uh-SAY-tuhng dee-NYAY-roo, POOR EE-soo EH BOHNG TIHR troo-KAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: Pay at the cashier of the store where you bought the souvenir. Some kiosks are cash-only, so it's good to have change.

responses.english: Pay at the cashier of the store where you bought the souvenir. Some kiosks are cash-only, so it's good to have change.
responses.phonetic: PAH-gih NOO KEYE-shuh DUH LAW-zhuh OHNG-dih koomp-ROHW AW soow-vih-NEER. ahl-GOONNGSH KEEOHSH-kihsh SAW uh-SAY-tuhng dee-NYAY-roo, POOR EE-soo EH BOHNG TIHR troo-KAH-doo.
responses.local: Pague no caixa da loja onde comprou o souvenir. Alguns quiosques só aceitam dinheiro, por isso é bom ter trocado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to order on terrace
phrases.text_local: Onde é que se faz o pedido no terraço?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH KIH SIH FAHSH AW peh-DEE-doo NOO teh-RAH-soo?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portugal, terrace cafes often have a separate counter for ordering, especially in tourist areas like Albufeira.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, no balcão da esplanada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH shpluh-NAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the terrace counter.

responses.english: Good morning, at the terrace counter.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NOO bahl-KOWN DUH shpluh-NAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, no balcão da esplanada.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso pagar por souvenirs aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo puh-GAHR POOR soow-vih-NEE-ruhsh uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao caixa ou ao dono da loja.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW KEYE-shuh OHW OW DOH-noo DUH LAW-zhuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the cashier or the shop owner.

responses.english: Ask the cashier or the shop owner.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW KEYE-shuh OHW OW DOH-noo DUH LAW-zhuh.
responses.local: Pergunte ao caixa ou ao dono da loja.
